product_results.title: Nike Men's Sneaker,Running Shoes, Anthracite/Metallic Silver/Black, 9.5

summary.text: Customers find these shoes comfortable and note they provide comfort to aching lower legs. The shoes are described as well put together and great quality. Customers appreciate the great look and mention the shoes look like floor models. However, customers have mixed opinions about the fit.

authors_reviews.title: Great shoe
authors_reviews.text: Very nice looking shoe and very comfortable
authors_reviews.author: Stephanie

authors_reviews.title: Sleek runner
authors_reviews.text: Shoes are awesome but had to return them.Ordered a size 12 and received a size 9.5?
authors_reviews.author: Carmen Lesperance

authors_reviews.title: Disappointed
authors_reviews.text: So so comfort. Disappointed but didn’t return because vendor couldn’t pay for delivery
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer
